## 🚀 Pull Request Summary
Provide a high-level technical summary of the architectural changes and their mathematical justification.

## 🧬 Scientific Verification
- [ ] **Gradient Checking**: For any new layers/losses, attach the numerical verification results below.
- [ ] **Benchmark Impact**: How does this change affect the `compare_sklearn` results?

## 🛠️ Changes Made
- (List of modified files and logical blocks)

## ✅ Engineering Checklist
- [ ] Code follows [PEP 8](https://peps.python.org/pep-0008/) and passes `make lint`.
- [ ] All functions have **Type Hints** and **Google-style Docstrings**.
- [ ] New unit tests added under `tests/`.
- [ ] Pedagogical Notebook updated/created.
- [ ] Documentation (`api_reference.md`) updated.

## ⚠️ Breaking Changes
List any changes that break existing model APIs or checkpoint compatibility.
